name: @dcqt/contracts
description: Solidity contracts for the datacenter RWA registry layer

scripts.test:unit: hardhat test test/DataCenterAssetRegistry.test.ts test/EmergencyCouncil.test.ts test/NamespacedRegistrar.test.ts test/ReentrancyGuard.test.ts test/tokenization/IdentityRegistry.test.ts test/tokenization/ModularCompliance.test.ts test/tokenization/AssetToken.test.ts test/tokenization/compliance-modules.test.ts test/tokenization/NavOracle.test.ts test/tokenization/DividendDistributor.test.ts test/tokenization/TransferAgent.test.ts
scripts.test:fuzz: hardhat test test/fuzz/property.test.ts test/fuzz/negative-paths.test.ts test/fuzz/council.test.ts test/fuzz/namespaced-registrar.test.ts
scripts.test:deep: cross-env FAST_CHECK_RUNS=200 FAST_CHECK_INVARIANT_RUNS=50 FAST_CHECK_INVARIANT_DEPTH=80 hardhat test
scripts.check:all: npm run lint && npm run compile && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:fuzz && npm run test:invariant && npm run test:gas-baseline
